text:
*[Bug 6701] lookup.xport in foreign ignoring some datasets*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=6701>

Tom Abernathy (<mailto:tom.abernathy@gmail.com|tom.abernathy@gmail.com>) changed:

           What    |Removed                     |Added
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
                 CC|                            |tom.abernathy@gmail.com

--- Comment #7 from Tom Abernathy (<mailto:tom.abernathy@gmail.com|tom.abernathy@gmail.com>) ---
Since the SAS log of the code that created the XPORT file that had issues
before it is mostly that the issue was in the creation side and not in
foreign's ability to read the dataset.

Since foreign is working fine for SAS XPORT files with multiple datasets, some
of which are empty, this should be closed.
